ksa_text: Knowledge of IT service management principles as applied to data services, including service catalog design, service level management, incident and problem management, and continual service improvement.

dcwf.top_element_label: Knowledge of critical information technology (IT) procurement requirements.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Strategies to maximize AI benefits and minimize negative impacts are planned, prepared, implemented, documented, and informed by input from relevant AI actors.

top_anchors.element_label: Knowledge of critical information technology (IT) procurement requirements.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA OP-K-007 (OP, Knowledge) does not clear the moderate fit inclusion threshold of 0.43. Composite score 0.4279 is insufficient to establish relevance to business intelligence development and analytics engineering at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (nice=0.428, ddat=0.410, eu_ai_act=0.408) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Score 0.4279 below threshold for moderate fit domain; no rescuing analytics text signals. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does OP-domain KSA OP-K-007 (composite 0.4279) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Composite 0.4279 for OP domain does not meet the evidentiary bar for ANL IC-level inclusion per DDAT Senior Data Analyst and Lead Analyst profiles; operational workflow competencies documented in IC-to-senior-IC analytics roles. External sources confirm this competency is not a standard expectation for BI Developer at the targeted seniority band.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms OP domain KSA at composite 0.4279 is not a standard requirement for BI Developer at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4279, domain OP, scope moderate fit. High confidence.
